title: Dressrosa Remembers Its Victims
description: Pages 1–5 focus on dressrosa remembers its victims, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The Royal Palace, Floor BI (Outer Wall Tower).

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UwaaaahH- HH!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Luffy and friends after their sudden encounter with PICA...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's going on?! There are dead ends all over the place!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The walls are moving according to PICA's will!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Straw hat!! Will he...re- ally be all right...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hm?! you mean zero?! Don't worry about him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He can take any- thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: On the same floor - zero vs PICA.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Remember, someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's no end to this....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where do I have to hit this guy to do some actual damage?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The Royal Palace, Floor If - Mr Soldier and the dwarfs.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: King Riku

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's another officer!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: This one's from the PICA Army...

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: It's Gladius ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's no beating this one if we take him head-on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Me and Rampo will create an opening!! You go on ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey!! Stop!! You can't keep doing things like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let's pincer him from either side, kabu- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Why do I have to take care of these Measly rats?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: KABU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Ranpo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Someone is especially

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: A toy can only run so fast.

summary: Dressrosa Remembers Its Victims focuses on Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.
